title: Sign in and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies a user can sign in with valid credentials and is taken to the Strategic Lines Dashboard where core BSC data is displayed.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify perspectives are displayed with progress information

title: Update an activity progress via data entry and see it reflected in Actions and Weightings
description: Verifies a user can update an activity progress from the data-entry page and then observe the updated progress reflected in Actions and Weightings views.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the data entry view
Select a perspective from the perspective dropdown
Select a project from the project dropdown
Select an activity from the activity dropdown
Adjust the progress slider to a new value
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Click the navigation link to open the actions view
Expand the project section corresponding to the selection
Verify the selected activity shows the updated progress value
Click the navigation link to open the weightings table view
Expand the perspective section corresponding to the selection
Expand the project section corresponding to the selection
Verify the selected activity shows the updated progress value

title: View perspectives progress and KPI summary on dashboard
description: Verifies the dashboard renders the perspectives list with weighted progress and the KPI summary tiles after authentication.

steps.description: Verify a KPI summary section is displayed
Verify a list of perspectives with progress bars is displayed

title: View activities grouped by project and inspect progress/responsibles
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the Actions view and see activities grouped by project with progress statuses and responsible information displayed.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the actions view
Verify activities are displayed for the expanded project including progress status information
Verify responsible information is displayed for at least one activity

title: View weightings hierarchy and inspect weight and progress indicators
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open the Weightings table, expand perspective and project levels, and see weight badges and progress indicators for activities.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the weightings table view
Expand a project section within that perspective
Verify activities are displayed with weight information
Verify progress indicators are displayed for activities

title: Browse projects grouped by perspective
description: Verifies an authenticated user can navigate to Projects and view projects grouped under perspectives with project progress/details visible.

steps.description: Click the navigation option to open the Projects view
Verify projects are displayed grouped by perspective
Verify project progress/details are visible for at least one project

title: Cascading selects enablement from perspective to project to activity
description: Verifies that selecting a perspective enables project selection and selecting a project enables activity selection.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the data entry view
Select a perspective from the perspective dropdown
Verify the project dropdown is enabled and available for selection
Select a project from the project dropdown
Verify the activity dropdown is enabled and available for selection

title: Expand and collapse perspective sections in Projects view
description: Verifies a user can expand and collapse perspective sections to explore contained projects and the section content updates accordingly.

steps.description: Click the navigation option to open the Projects view
Verify the projects list within that perspective is hidden after collapsing

title: Expand and collapse a project section to show and hide its activities
description: Verifies the user can expand a project section to reveal activities and then collapse it to hide them again.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the actions view
Verify the activities list for that project section is not displayed

title: View actions across perspectives without expanding any project
description: Verifies the Actions view loads successfully and presents a list of project sections without requiring any expansions.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the actions view
Verify project sections are displayed in the actions view

title: Collapse expanded weightings sections to return to a higher-level view
description: Verifies the user can collapse expanded perspective and project sections in the Weightings table to hide underlying rows.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the weightings table view
Expand a project section within that perspective
Verify no activity rows are displayed for the collapsed perspective section

title: Validate required selections when submitting without project or activity
description: Verifies submitting an update after selecting only a perspective shows a validation error indicating required selections are missing.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the data entry view
Select a perspective from the perspective dropdown
Verify a validation error is visible indicating required selections are missing

title: Auto-scroll to an expanded project section
description: Verifies that expanding a project section scrolls the view so the expanded section is brought into view.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the actions view
Scroll down until multiple project sections are out of view above the fold
Expand a project section that is partially off-screen
Verify the expanded project section is brought into view

title: Expand two different project sections and inspect both activity lists
description: Verifies the user can expand multiple project sections and see activities for each expanded section.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the actions view
Verify activities are displayed for both expanded project sections

title: Expand multiple perspectives in the weightings table
description: Verifies the user can expand more than one perspective section to inspect multiple hierarchies within the table.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the weightings table view
Verify project rows are displayed under both expanded perspective sections

title: Set progress slider to boundary values
description: Verifies the progress slider can be set to the minimum and maximum values and the UI reflects those values.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to open the data entry view
Select a perspective from the perspective dropdown
Select a project from the project dropdown
Select an activity from the activity dropdown
Verify the progress value shown corresponds to the maximum slider value

title: Toggle theme to dark and back on dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can switch the dashboard theme to dark mode and then back to light mode with the UI updating accordingly.

steps.description: Click the theme toggle button in the header
Click the theme toggle button in the header
Verify the page is displayed in light mode

title: Show invalid credentials error
description: Verifies submitting invalid credentials keeps the user on the sign-in experience and shows an authentication error message.

steps.description: Fill invalid_user into the username field
Fill invalid_password into the password field
Verify an authentication error message is visible
Verify the user is not on the dashboard

title: Theme selection persists when navigating from dashboard to projects
description: Verifies that after switching to dark mode on the dashboard, navigating to the projects view keeps the app in dark mode.

steps.description: Click the theme toggle button in the header
Click the navigation link to the projects view
Verify the page is displayed in dark mode

title: Theme selection persists after refresh on a protected route
description: Verifies that after switching to dark mode, reloading the page on a protected route retains the selected theme.

steps.description: Click the theme toggle button in the header
Click the navigation link to the projects view
Verify the page is displayed in dark mode

title: Toggle password visibility
description: Verifies the user can toggle the password field visibility to confirm what they typed.

steps.description: Fill some_password into the password field
Verify the password is displayed visibly in the password field

title: Theme selection persists when navigating to data entry
description: Verifies that dark mode remains enabled when the user moves from the dashboard to the data entry view.

steps.description: Click the theme toggle button in the header
Click the navigation link to the data entry view
Verify the page is displayed in dark mode

title: Theme selection persists when navigating to weightings table
description: Verifies that dark mode remains enabled when the user navigates from the dashboard to the weightings view.

steps.description: Click the theme toggle button in the header
Click the navigation link to the weightings view
Verify the page is displayed in dark mode
